PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1/auth/login' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"email":"super@example.com","password":"Admin@12345"}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).accessToken; if \($token\) { Write-Host "Got token: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..." } else { Write-Host "Login failed or server not running" })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"kiran@adwest.com","password":"Admin@12345"}'; $token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1/auth/login' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).accessToken; if \($token\) { Write-Host "Got token"; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1/org/locations/97654074-4928-42a2-b00c-d27a874338d9' -Method DELETE -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "DELETE result: $\($result | ConvertTo-Json\)" } else { Write-Host "Token fetch failed" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Projects\\ADWest\\ad-west\\ad-west-web"; $errors = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $lines = $errors -split "`n"; $filtered = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "SreniContactListPage|SthanContactsPage|TableLayoutModal|useTableLayout|backendApi\\.ts" }; if \($filtered\) { $filtered } else { "No errors in modified files" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Projects\\ADWest\\ad-west\\ad-west-api"; $errors = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $lines = $errors -split "`n"; $filtered = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "table-layout|user-table-layout|user-management\\.module" }; if \($filtered\) { $filtered } else { "No errors in new backend files" })
